incubatedItem.name: high level Corrupted Gem or Valuable Gem

name: Atziri's Promise
enchantMods: Used when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy, if not already in effect
explicitMods: Gain 8% of Elemental Damage as Extra Chaos Damage during effect
2% of Chaos Damage Leeched as Life during Effect
Gain 6% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage during effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: "Death needs not your understanding. It needs only your loyalty."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

name: Oriath's End
enchantMods: Used when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy, if not already in effect
explicitMods: 28% increased Charge Recovery
Enemies you Kill during Effect have a 27% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Damage of a Random Element
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: Ennui prevailed, until inspiration sparked
a mote of flame, kindled by fury
and all in his path were obliterated.

name: Rumi's Concoction
enchantMods: Used when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy, if not already in effect
explicitMods: +10% Chance to Block Attack Damage during Effect
+6% Chance to Block Spell Damage during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: "Yesterday I was clever, so I wanted to change the world.
Today I am wise, so I am changing myself."
-Rumi of the Vaal

name: Polaric Devastation
explicitMods: 22% increased Global Critical Strike Chance
+36% to Fire Resistance
+28% to Cold Resistance
10% increased Duration of Ailments on Enemies
Left Ring slot: Cover Enemies in Ash for 5 seconds when you Ignite them
Right Ring slot: Cover Enemies in Frost for 5 seconds when you Freeze them
flavourText: Those that escaped the annihilating light
sank eternally into crushing darkness.

name: Crown of Eyes
explicitMods: +349 to Accuracy Rating
149% increased Energy Shield
-30% to Fire Resistance
0.56% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life
0.37% of Attack Damage Leeched as Mana
Increases and Reductions to Spell Damage also apply to Attacks at 150% of their value
flavourText: Turning, gazing, blinking,
behold the eyes of void.
Burning, razing, drinking,
your mind is destroyed.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports aura skills that reserve life or mana to create auras around you.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 19% increased Aura effect
Supported Skills have no Reservation

Supported Skills also count as Blessing Skills
You can only have one Aura on you from your Blessing Skills
Your Non-Blessing Skills which Reserve Mana are Disabled while you have an Aura from a Supported Skill on you
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants elemental resistances and elemental ailment immunity to you and your allies.
explicitMods: +1.9 metres to radius
You and nearby allies gain +38% to all Elemental Resistances
You and nearby allies are Immune to all Elemental Ailments
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts a buff that grants different bonuses to melee skills depending on your stance. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.
explicitMods: Melee Skills deal 15% more Area Damage while in Blood Stance
Melee Skills have 5% less Area of Effect while in Blood Stance
Melee Skills have 15% more Area of Effect while in Sand Stance
Melee Skills deal 5% less Area Damage while in Sand Stance
50% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: The Untouched Soul
explicitMods: +48 to maximum Life for each Empty Red Socket on any Equipped Item
+225 to Accuracy Rating for each Empty Green Socket on any Equipped Item
+48 to maximum Mana for each Empty Blue Socket on any Equipped Item
+18% to all Elemental Resistances for each Empty White Socket on any Equipped Item
flavourText: Geomancy offered a safer way to use the Tears...
but most Maji rejected that temptation as well.

name: Cinderswallow Urn
enchantMods: Used when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy, if not already in effect
explicitMods: +10 to Maximum Charges
Recharges 5 Charges when you Consume an Ignited corpse
Enemies Ignited by you during Effect have Malediction
Enemies Ignited by you during Effect take 10% increased Damage
Recover 2% of Life when you Kill an Enemy during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: A controlled burn is sometimes necessary for new life.

name: Rathpith Globe
explicitMods: 10% Chance to Block Spell Damage
158% increased Energy Shield
10% increased maximum Life
Sacrifice 10% of your Life when you Use or Trigger a Spell Skill
5% increased Spell Critical Strike Chance per 100 Player Maximum Life
5% increased Spell Damage per 100 Player Maximum Life
flavourText: The Vaal emptied their slaves of beating hearts,
and left a mountain of twitching dead.

properties.name: Spell, Movement, Duration, Cold, Travel, Blink, AoE

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies and leaving Chilled ground in an area at both ends of the teleport. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
explicitMods: Deals 1144 to 1716 Cold Damage
Base duration is 3.00 seconds
+0.3 metres to radius

19% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Normal or Magic Enemy in Area
99% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Rare or Unique Enemy in Area
48% increased maximum travel distance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: The Grey Wind
explicitMods: 48% increased Fire Damage
Attacks with this Weapon have Added Fire Damage equal to 13% of Player's Maximum Life
Each Rage also grants +2% to Fire Damage Over Time Multiplier
Nearby Enemies have Fire Exposure while at maximum Rage
+5 to Maximum Rage
flavourText: Silence fell... we gazed upon high.
The Red Pyre flared, palms wide.
Ash-laden gales scoured our flesh.
Four screams became one roar.

name: The Apostate
explicitMods: +38 to Strength
+21% to all Elemental Resistances
Gain Maximum Life instead of Maximum Energy Shield from Equipped Armour Items
flavourText: When I finally rejected my faith entirely, my stagnant belief
became thick white blood, as choking as it was nourishing.
